CHARGE_UP_POWER.title: Charge-Up
CHARGE_UP_POWER.description: For every [gold]8[/gold] stacks of Charge-Up,double the damage of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack.
CHARGE_UP_POWER.smartDescription: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack will deal [blue]{Mult}[/blue] times damage.
CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.title: Casket of Stars
CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.description: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], also gain a [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], add a [gold]Spark[/gold] card to {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} hand.
CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.title: Casket of Stars
CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.description: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], also gain an upgraded [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], add an upgraded [gold]Spark[/gold] card to {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} hand.
MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.title: Millisecond Pulsars
MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.description: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.smartDescripti: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.title: Pulse Magic
PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.description: This turn, {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.smartDescription: This turn, {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
